project_title: Social Impact in Primary Care Boot Camp (Jul - Aug)
project_description: Gain knowledge and skills to conduct meaningful social impact assessments

organization.name: Health In Action
organization.description: 醫護行者於2011年成立,是香港註冊非牟利組織。我們的願景是人人健康的社會,我們深信所有人都具擁有健康的基本權利,不受種族、宗教、性別或政治因素左右。 我們致力以「服務、研究、提倡、培育」的循環模式在香港推動健康公平。我們主要服務群體包括葵青區在職低收入家庭、少數族裔和難民。醫護行者是香港社會服務聯會成員,亦獲得聯合國經濟社會理事會特殊諮詢地位。 我們希望透過提倡健康公平以達致社會公義。健康人權包括身體、精神和社交層面的健康。除了涵蓋衛生服務以外, 我們所出生、成長、工作、生活、老邁的環境與條件也息息相關, 我們稱之為「健康的社會決定因素」。 透過接觸香港的弱勢社群,我們明白要讓每一個人獲得健康,解決健康的社會決定因素攸關重要。現時,我們的服務對象在達致健康生活面臨重重困難。我們誠意邀請有志宣揚社會公義和健康的人士或及團體與我們合作並交流意見,為達致人人健康的願景而努力。

what_we_need: Part 1: A 6-hour session on innovative social impact assessment training, which will include:
(1) Site visit and HIA services introduction
(2) Learn SIA through our organisation's SIA examples and get introduced to various stakeholders involved
(3) Study commonly used methods, tools and teachnques used for SIA
Part 2: A 43-hour of practical experiences, including
(1) Participation in telephone interviews to collect data;
(2) Conduct focus group inteview with 10-12 individuals related to the SIA
(3) Prepare interview summary; (4) Collect and analyse the gathered data
(4) Collect and analyse the gathered data
A 1-hour gathering with our founder, Dr. Fan Ning, who will share the development of our organisation and his experiences and challenges working in the primary care settings
The volunteers are required to join all parts of the boot camp while the time and date of the practical experiences could be further arranged
You should be a current undergraduate in social sciences, public health or other health-related programs, Postgraduates are also welcomed
project_details.background: Social impact assessment in primary care is a systematic evaluation of how healthcare services influence individuals and communities' social well-being beyond clinical outcomes. It examines the broader effects on social determinants of health and guides resources allocation to promote health equity. Recognizing this importance, Health In Action is excited to offer a comprehensive 50-hour "Social Impact in Primary Care Boot Camp" to equip participants with knowledge and skills needed to conduct meaningful social impact assessments.
project_details.what_we_have: This boot camp deepens your understanding and practical skills in social impact within primary care. Don't miss out on this wonderful opportunity!
project_details.why_important: Health In Action was established in 2011 and is a registered non-governmental organization in Hong Kong. We firmly believe that everyone has the right to health regardless of occupation, economic status, gender, ethnicity, living environment or education level. With this belief, HIA is committed to the development of primary care by adopting social-medical integration through collaboration and practices; promoting health as the core of different sectors, and improving the health-related social determining factors. We explore and understand how social determining factors affect the health of different communities.
project_details.location: "Kwai Tsing Community Health Management Hub" Unit 5B1-2, Wing Cheung Industrial Building, 58-70 Kwai Cheong Road, Kwai Chung

special_program.name: Swire Trust Go-Givers Program
special_program.description: Swire Trust Go-Givers Program aims to encourage skilled volunteers to support Swire Trust NGO partners in education, marine conservation, and arts.
